Use WUM

Operational docs for listing, installing, diagnosing, and fixing Windows Update issues.

CLI Mode One-shot commands, arguments, options, diagnostics, and troubleshooting. Interactive Mode Smart shell, slash command subpages, screenshots, completion, history, and shortcuts.

WUM - Windows Update Manager CLI for scriptable update control.
